_publications._publicationTitle: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting to Characterize Childhood and Young Adult Brain Tumors.

_contextSnippet: In this small sample, increased T1 (>1,701 ms) predicted HG tumors perfectly, and so a penalized multivariable logistic regression of T1 and T2 on tumor grade was performed.
details: Increased T1 >1,701 ms predicted high-grade tumors perfectly in this cohort, with adjusted OR 1.01 (95% CI 1.00-1.03, p=0.036)
